locations.name: 阿普里馬克河
locations.summary: 阿普里馬克河（西班牙語：Río Apurímac）是全球最大河流系統亞馬遜河的源頭，發源至距離太平洋海岸160公里的秘魯西南部高5,597米的密斯米雪山，向西北流經庫斯科，阿普里馬克河在730.04公里的地方（12°15′46″S 73°…

relations.subject: Urubamba antpitta
relations.evidence: marcapatensis is found to the Yanatili's east. It inhabits humid montane forest and prefers the understory or forest floor. It is found at elevations of 2,450–3,650 m. The Urubamba antpitta is separated from the closely related Ayacucho antpitta by the Apurímac river.{{Cite journal|last1=Chesser|first1=R
